mappings.description: Task intake nodes shown in neural shell
mappings.pass_logic: JSON parses and contains tasks array with at least one object
mappings.failure_logic: File missing or invalid JSON or empty required keys

mappings.description: Owner comment nodes bound to runtime comments
mappings.pass_logic: JSON parses and comments array exists
links array exists and relation objects parse
mappings.failure_logic: File missing or malformed links structure

mappings.description: Evidence glow intensity for runtime receipts
mappings.pass_logic: At least one receipt json exists and parses
mappings.failure_logic: No receipts or invalid receipt documents

mappings.pass_logic: At least one export zip and manifest are available
mappings.failure_logic: No export artifacts or broken manifest chain

mappings.pass_logic: Reports parse and include verdict fields
mappings.failure_logic: Missing delta reports or invalid report JSON

mappings.description: Agent exchange thread and status node
mappings.pass_logic: Exchange state parses and status report exists

mappings.description: Checker execution status node for V0.3 and V0.4
mappings.pass_logic: Checker report files parse and include summary verdicts
